name: image_load_side_load_abused_dlls_susp_paths
raw_query: any where (file.path like~ ("*\\coreclr.dll", "*\\facesdk.dll", "*\\HPCustPartUI.dll", "*\\libcef.dll", "*\\ZIPDLL.dll")) and ((file.path like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*", "*\\Windows\\Temp\\*")) or ((file.path:"*:\\Users\\*" and file.path:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (file.path:"*:\\Users\\*" and file.path:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (file.path:"*:\\Users\\*" and file.path:"*\\Contacts\\*") or (file.path:"*:\\Users\\*" and file.path:"*\\Pictures\\*")))
